subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Lord of Eternity, Who hath illumined the world through the splendours of His Most Great Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک قدم را لایق و سزاست که از انوار اسم اعظم عالم را منور فرمود حجتش
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
